content.text: NC Statewide Mapping Advisory Committee Meeting Agenda

Location: Archdale Bldg. Ground Floor Hearing Room, 512 N. Salisbury St., Raleigh, NC 27603
Phone: 641-715-3840 (Access Code: 1061167#)
Web Conference: https://meet.lync.com/ncconnect-its/david.giordano/R1BRWH27

(Discussion related to opportunities, development, maintenance, and issues for base data important to NC)
* Orthoimagery - Darrin Smith
* Cadastral - John Bridgers, Pam Carver
* Elevation - Hope Morgan
* Hydrography - Cam McNutt
* Geodetic Control - Gary Thompson

(Status and importance of data required and strongly recommended for Next Generation 9-1-1)
* Administrative/Governmental Units
    o County Boundaries - Gary Thompson
    o Municipal Boundaries - John Farley
* Transportation - John Farley
* Addresses - David Giordano

(A report is expected only for those working groups listed)
* Roads and Transportation - John Farley
* Metadata Committee - Sarah Wray
* Stream Mapping Advisory Committee - Cam McNutt
* Orthoimagery and Elevation - Gary Thompson
* NC Board on Geographic Names - David Giordano
* 2022 Reference Frame - Gary Thompson

* National Geospatial Programs Office - Silvia Terziotti
* NC OneMap - David Giordano
SMAC Web Site - http://it.nc.gov/gicc | CGIA Telephone - 919-754-6580 | NC OneMap Web Site - www.nconemap.gov
